items.title: Cathie Wood buys $14 million of megacap AI stocks
items.description: Cathie Wood didn’t hesitate when tech investors started flinching. On Feb. 17, ARK’s daily disclosures showed buys of $8 million in Broadcom (AVGO) and about $6 million in Advanced Micro Devices (AMD). That’s a massive $14 million combined push into two of the biggest AI infrastructure giants, just ...

items.title: Tracking Al Gore's Generation Investment Management Portfolio - Q4 2025 Update
Atlassian names LinkedIn veteran James Chuong as CFO
items.description: Atlassian on Wednesday named James Chuong as its new ‌chief financial officer, effective March ‌30, taking over from Joe Binz.  Chuong, 46, will ​join the enterprise software company after over a decade as the finance chief of LinkedIn, a subsidiary of Microsoft.  In ‌his new ⁠role, he will oversee Atlassian's finance and legal teams, the ⁠company said.

items.title: 2 of Robinhood's Top 10 Stocks Are Best Buys According to Wall Street
items.description: Alphabet and Amazon are both reliable evergreen stocks.

items.title: Why Is CoStar (CSGP) Stock Soaring Today
items.description: Shares of real estate data provider CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) jumped 6.7% in the afternoon session after the company unveiled a new artificial intelligence tool, Homes AI, for its Homes.com real estate platform.
